nasb.text: Now Joseph stayed in Egypt, he and his father’s household, and Joseph lived one hundred and ten years.

esv.text: So Joseph remained in Egypt, he and his father’s house. Joseph lived 110 years.

cnv.text: 約瑟和他父親的家人，都住在埃及。約瑟活了一百一十歲。

ccb.text: 约瑟和他父亲全家住在埃及。约瑟享年一百一十岁。

csbs.text: 约瑟和他父亲全家都住在埃及。约瑟活了一百一十岁。
